prompt: Ultra-photorealistic candid portrait of a beautiful young woman indoors, captured in the style of an authentic everyday snapshot rather than a posed photoshoot. She stands in front of a warm, subtly textured beige wall decorated with a small collection of casually pinned instant photos that are softly blurred in the background, creating a cozy, lived-in atmosphere. She wears an oversized black crew-neck T-shirt with a relaxed fit, and her naturally loose hair falls effortlessly around her shoulders. Her body is turned slightly at an angle while she looks toward the camera with a radiant, genuine smile, eyes sparkling with warmth and happiness. One hand gently tucks a loose strand of hair behind her ear while the other rests casually by her side, giving the portrait an unforced, believable feel. Soft practical indoor lighting bathes the scene in warm tones, complemented by pronounced 35mm film grain, muted vintage color grading, lifted shadows, and a subtly underexposed analog aesthetic. The background remains pleasantly out of focus, enhancing depth while keeping the pinned photos recognizable. No heavy makeup, no excessive retouching, no artificial beauty filters—just natural skin texture, realistic imperfections, and authentic emotion. Cinematic lifestyle photography, editorial quality, ultra-detailed, highly realistic, shallow depth of field, 8K, square 1:1 composition.

promptZh: 一张超写实的室内抓拍人像，主体为 美丽的年轻女性，采用真实生活快照风格而非摆拍。她站在一面 温暖且带有细微纹理的米色墙壁 前，墙上随意地贴着几张拍立得照片，背景中的照片略显模糊，营造出温馨且充满生活气息的氛围。她穿着一件 宽松的黑色圆领 T 恤，剪裁休闲，自然散落的秀发垂在肩头。她身体微微侧转，看向镜头，脸上带着灿烂而真诚的笑容，双眼闪烁着温暖与幸福的光芒。一只手轻轻将一缕碎发别到耳后，另一只手自然地垂在身侧，使整张人像看起来自然且真实。柔和的室内实用光线为场景笼罩上一层暖色调，辅以明显的 35mm 胶片颗粒感、柔和的复古调色、提亮的阴影以及略微欠曝的模拟美学。背景保持舒适的虚化效果，既增强了景深，又让墙上的照片清晰可辨。无浓妆、无过度修图、无人工美颜滤镜——只有自然的皮肤纹理、真实的瑕疵和真挚的情感。电影感生活方式摄影，杂志级画质，超细节，高度写实，浅景深，8K 分辨率，1:1 正方形构图。
